adminPage.title: Operations panel
adminPage.description: Manage content, protection artifacts, support, and emergency access according to your operator role.
adminPage.noAccessTitle: This role has no operator access
adminPage.noAccessBody: Use the appropriate operator account or return to the main dashboard.
adminPage.contentDescription: New content is always saved as a draft so it can be reviewed before publication.
adminPage.moduleCreateError: The module draft could not be created.
adminPage.noModules: No modules are available for this role yet.
adminPage.releaseDescription: Only artifacts that exist in controlled server storage and match their checksum can be recorded as validated.
adminPage.gateContract: Input contract and threshold are recorded
adminPage.releaseValidated: The artifact was recorded as validated.
adminPage.releaseCreateError: The artifact failed validation. Check the file, checksum, and contract.
adminPage.supportDescription: Tickets show persisted case data; handling details remain subject to operator auditing.
adminPage.noTickets: There are no support tickets in the queue.
adminPage.emergencyDescription: The protected user creates a device-bound request. One platform admin reviews it and a different platform admin issues the single-use key.
adminPage.requestCreated: Request created. Waiting for a second platform admin.
adminPage.requestReviewed: Request reviewed. A different platform admin must issue the key.
adminPage.waitingSecondAdmin: Your request is waiting for another platform admin.
adminPage.noEmergencyRequests: There are no emergency access requests awaiting approval.
adminPage.keyReadyBody: Copy it now. This value is shown only after approval and is valid for one use within 24 hours.
adminPage.keyError: The emergency access workflow could not be processed.

researchSandbox.title: Synthetic research sandbox
researchSandbox.description: Review evaluation flows, schemas, and displays with deterministic fixtures without recruiting participants or using real user data.
researchSandbox.inviteBody: This space is intended for invited evaluators and platform administrators.
researchSandbox.warningBody: Every number, participant, and outcome on this page is synthetic dummy data for product testing. These figures must not be cited as effectiveness evidence.
researchSandbox.stagesBody: Choose a stage to review its data shape and internal export.
researchSandbox.fixtureBody: Each stage uses 48 deterministic records with explicit synthetic labels.
researchSandbox.footnote: Enrollment, participant consent, and real research-data exports remain locked until an applicable protocol and ethics approval are available.
